query:
INSERT INTO service_departments (department_code, department_name, description, service_type, category, requires_disclaimer, disclaimer_type, licensing_fee_monthly, licensing_fee_annual, revenue_split_laws, revenue_split_house, revenue_split_trust, display_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('DESIGN', 'Design Services', 'Logo design, branding, merchandise design, marketing materials, and graphics.', 'licensable', 'creative', FALSE, NULL, 99.00, 999.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 5, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('MEDIA', 'Media Services', 'Video production, audio production, photography, and content creation.', 'licensable', 'creative', FALSE, NULL, 149.00, 1499.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 6, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('MARKETING', 'Marketing Services', 'Marketing campaigns, social media management, advertising, and promotion.', 'licensable', 'creative', FALSE, NULL, 129.00, 1299.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 7, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('PROPERTY', 'Property Management Services', 'Tenant management, maintenance coordination, rent collection, and property oversight.', 'licensable', 'operational', FALSE, NULL, 199.00, 1999.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 8, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('EDUCATION', 'Education Services', 'Tutoring, curriculum development, training programs, and educational content.', 'licensable', 'educational', FALSE, NULL, 79.00, 799.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 9, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('PURCHASING', 'Purchasing Management Services', 'Vendor management, procurement, ordering, and supply chain coordination.', 'licensable', 'operational', FALSE, NULL, 89.00, 899.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 10, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('HEALTH', 'Health Services', 'Wellness programs, health coordination, and wellness education. Does not constitute medical advice.', 'licensable', 'health', TRUE, 'health_disclaimer', 149.00, 1499.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 11, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
('BIZ_MGMT', 'Business Management Services', 'Bookkeeping, financial reporting, and administrative support. Does not constitute financial advice.', 'licensable', 'operational', TRUE, 'financial_disclaimer', 119.00, 1199.00, 30.00, 60.00, 10.00, 12, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
